response.objective_caption: A person with shoulder-length dark hair featuring blonde streaks wears a red headband with a large bow and a white sleeveless top with red polka dots and red ribbon straps. They hold a dark red rose vertically in front of their mouth with both hands. A thin chain necklace is visible around their neck. The background is dark and indistinct.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A person with shoulder-length dark hair featuring blonde streaks wears a red headband with a large bow and a white sleeveless top with red polka dots and red ribbon straps. They hold a dark red rose vertically in front of their mouth with both hands while looking directly at the camera with an intense, hostile expression. Harsh flash lighting creates blown-out highlights on the skin and deep shadows, producing extreme exposure contrast and an unflattering, aggressive snapshot aesthetic.
